title: Initiation record
description: One initiate in the lightseed initiation ledger. Git is the source of truth.

name.description: Chosen name — how the forest calls you.

handle.description: Kebab handle; must equal the filename stem.

lid.description: The Lightseed ID — a UUIDv7, the initiate's portable true name across nodes (equals persons/{uid}.lid).

pubkey.description: base64 of the ed25519 public key in SPKI/DER form.

vision.description: The validated vision (authored by a validated user) this initiation is built on.

domain.description: Optional — the forest/domain this initiation forms or joins.

uid.description: Optional — the app account (Firebase uid) this initiate declares as theirs; binds the ledger identity to the mirror.

genesis.description: A founding-ring member; exempt from the three-sponsor rule.

sponsors.description: Three existing initiates who signed this newcomer's pubkey. Empty only for genesis members.

signature.description: base64 ed25519 signature over the signing message.
